name: smoke
description: 5-task quick validation suite (one easy task per language)

tasks.description: KeyError from case-sensitive email lookup. The lookup_user function uses the raw email as dict key without normalizing case.
Nullish coalescing mishandles falsy 0/empty-string. Using ?? instead of || means 0 and empty string are treated as valid values.
Non-exhaustive when on sealed class. Missing branch for recently added subclass causes NoWhenBranchMatchedException.
Goroutine leak from unbuffered channel with no reader. Goroutine writes to channel but reader was removed.
Dangling reference from returned local borrow. Function creates local String and tries to return reference to it.
